research_goal: Identify novel interventions to reduce academic burnout among graduate students

domain_context.research_anchor: Graduate student mental health and well-being — specifically academic burnout drivers and mitigation strategies
domain_context.target_population: PhD and Masters students at research universities, years 1-5
domain_context.context_setting: Western research university contexts, post-COVID academic environment
hard_constraints: Interventions must be feasible within existing university resource constraints
Must be ethically approvable without extensive IRB burden
soft_factors: Interest in peer-based rather than top-down interventions

cross_disciplinary_targets: Sports psychology — peak performance under pressure

literature_hierarchy.primary: Peer-reviewed psychology and education journals (last 10 years)
literature_hierarchy.treat_with_caution: Studies from pre-2000, single-institution convenience samples without controls

domain_context.output_format_preference: top 10 ranked hypotheses grouped by theme, abstract-style summary
